options.name: --add-dir
options.description: Additional directories to allow tool access to

options.name: --agent
options.description: Agent for the current session (overrides 'agent' setting)

options.name: --agents
options.description: JSON object defining custom agents

options.name: --allow-dangerously-skip-permissions
options.description: Enable bypassing all permission checks as an option

name: --allowedTools
--allowed-tools
options.description: Comma or space-separated list of tool names to allow

options.name: --append-system-prompt
options.description: Append a system prompt to the default system prompt

options.name: --betas
options.description: Beta headers to include in API requests (API key users only)

options.name: --chrome
options.description: Enable Claude in Chrome integration

name: -c
--continue
options.description: Continue the most recent conversation in the current directory

options.name: --dangerously-skip-permissions
options.description: Bypass all permission checks (sandboxes only)

name: -d
--debug
options.description: Enable debug mode with optional category filter (e.g. 'api,hooks')

options.name: --debug-file
options.description: Write debug logs to a specific file path

options.name: --disable-slash-commands
options.description: Disable all skills

name: --disallowedTools
--disallowed-tools
options.description: Comma or space-separated list of tool names to deny

options.name: --effort
options.description: Effort level for the current session

options.name: --fallback-model
options.description: Fallback model when default is overloaded (only with --print)

options.name: --file
options.description: File resources to download at startup (format: file_id:relative_path)

options.name: --fork-session
options.description: Create a new session ID instead of reusing the original (use with --resume or --continue)

options.name: --from-pr
options.description: Resume a session linked to a PR by PR number/URL

name: -h
--help
options.description: Display help for command

options.name: --ide
options.description: Automatically connect to IDE on startup

options.name: --include-partial-messages
options.description: Include partial message chunks as they arrive (only with --print and stream-json)

options.name: --input-format
options.description: Input format (only with --print)

options.name: --json-schema
options.description: JSON Schema for structured output validation

options.name: --max-budget-usd
options.description: Maximum dollar amount to spend on API calls (only with --print)

options.name: --mcp-config
options.description: Load MCP servers from JSON files or strings

options.name: --mcp-debug
options.description: [DEPRECATED] Enable MCP debug mode

options.name: --model
options.description: Model for the current session

options.name: --no-chrome
options.description: Disable Claude in Chrome integration

options.name: --no-session-persistence
options.description: Disable session persistence (only with --print)

options.name: --output-format
options.description: Output format (only with --print)

options.name: --permission-mode
options.description: Permission mode for the session

options.name: --plugin-dir
options.description: Load plugins from directories for this session only

name: -p
--print
options.description: Print response and exit (useful for pipes)

options.name: --replay-user-messages
options.description: Re-emit user messages from stdin back on stdout (stream-json only)

name: -r
--resume
options.description: Resume a conversation by session ID or open interactive picker

options.name: --session-id
options.description: Use a specific session ID (must be a valid UUID)

options.name: --setting-sources
options.description: Comma-separated list of setting sources to load (user, project, local)

options.name: --settings
options.description: Path to a settings JSON file or a JSON string

options.name: --strict-mcp-config
options.description: Only use MCP servers from --mcp-config, ignoring all other MCP configurations

options.name: --system-prompt
options.description: System prompt to use for the session

options.name: --tmux
options.description: Create a tmux session for the worktree (requires --worktree)

options.name: --tools
options.description: Specify the list of available tools ("" to disable all, "default" for all)

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Override verbose mode setting from config

name: -v
--version
options.description: Output the version number

name: -w
--worktree
options.description: Create a new git worktree for this session
